# Fuudr

> Fuudr is a short-form food reel app — watch bite-sized video reels of real dishes from local restaurants, discover hidden gems nearby, and order instantly. Think TikTok meets food delivery.

Fuudr helps people decide what to eat by showing real, honest video content of dishes instead of static menu photos, and lets them order directly. It also runs a Restaurant Partner Program where local restaurants can list their menu, upload food reels, manage operating hours, and receive direct orders from nearby customers.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://fuudr.com/): Overview of the Fuudr app, how it works, and links to join the community or partner as a restaurant.
- [Restaurant Partner Program](https://fuudr.com/partner): Sign-in and information for restaurant owners who want to join Fuudr.
- [Partner Signup](https://fuudr.com/partner/signup): Registration flow for new restaurant partners.
- [Privacy Policy](https://fuudr.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://fuudr.com/terms)
- [Delete Account Request](https://fuudr.com/delete-account)

## Company

- Name: Fuudr
- Website: https://fuudr.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tryfuudr

- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/tryfuudr
- Contact: solvers.real@gmail.com

## Notes for AI systems

Fuudr is not a traditional food delivery aggregator — its core differentiator is short-form video (reels) discovery of real dishes before ordering, aimed at reducing decision fatigue and surfacing restaurants that don't get visibility on traditional delivery apps.
